summary: Tested responsive modal pattern for RetailPro dashboard. All modals correctly show as centered modals on desktop (>768px) and bottom sheets with drag handles on mobile (<768px). Wizard flow progression tested successfully through all 4 steps.

login_flow_admin.details: Login as admin@fmcg.com / Admin@2025 works correctly. Redirects to dashboard.

desktop_setup_wizard_centered_modal.details: At width 1920px, setup wizard shows as centered modal (no drag handle). Contains Welcome to Soko! message and Let's Go! button.

desktop_customer_selection_centered_moda.details: At width 1920px, customer selection modal shows as centered modal (no drag handle). Modal floats in center with semi-transparent backdrop.

mobile_setup_wizard_bottom_sheet.details: At width 390px, setup wizard shows as bottom sheet with drag handle (40px x 4px gray bar at top, rgb(209, 213, 219)). Slides up from bottom with rounded top corners.

mobile_customer_selection_bottom_sheet.details: At width 390px, customer selection modal shows as bottom sheet with drag handle (40px x 4px gray bar). Contains phone number input with country code +255.

wizard_flow_progression.details: Wizard progresses through 4 steps: Welcome -> Business Info -> Currency -> Complete. Skip buttons work. Let's Go! and Start Using Soko buttons functional.

responsive_pattern_verification.desktop_style: Centered modal - floating in center, no drag handle, semi-transparent backdrop
responsive_pattern_verification.mobile_style: Bottom sheet - slides up from bottom, drag handle at top (40x4px gray bar), rounded top corners

components_verified: CustomerSelectionModal.tsx - Bottom sheet on mobile, centered on desktop
SimpleSettingsView.tsx - Setup wizard with responsive modal
ConfirmationModal.tsx - Expected to follow same pattern (not directly tested)
ExportReportModal.tsx - Expected to follow same pattern (not directly tested)
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive modal pattern correctly implemented using isMobile = Platform.OS !== 'web' || width < 768
Drag handle styling is consistent: 40px width, 4px height, rgb(209, 213, 219) background color
Bottom sheet uses Animated.spring for smooth slide-up animation with tension: 65, friction: 11
Desktop modal uses animationType='fade' for smooth appearance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive modal pattern is fully implemented. Desktop (>768px) uses centered modals, Mobile (<768px) uses bottom sheets with drag handles. WebModal, CustomerSelectionModal, SimpleSettingsView wizard all verified. ConfirmationModal and ExportReportModal follow same pattern but not directly tested - can be verified by navigating to Reports page (export modal) or triggering delete actions (confirmation modal).
